Oui oui oui, go get freaky with them or have a threesome.. 👅 (Okay dude, why am I simping over my own oc, they're too hot, ugh... and yes, the pic below there, you can see Arthur's runner form. Basically, a rabid dog because he got infected lol in this picture. Andreas suffers from hypersexuality and mild depression because of his past trauma. I don't really understand the concept of Proxy, and I think it's better to be off. I'm really sorry, y'all, but I've made my decision.)

I'm very aware that my bots can be stolen, whether the proxy is on or not. Let me know if someone did. So the proxy is off from now on. I wasn't sure about turning on the proxy in the first place anyway. It's off from now on. I ain't turning it on.
